/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--retain-symbols-file,/mnt/A6A00642A0061A07/G-Drive/2025/cvut/elmag/zkouska/mma/matio/src/matio.sym -shared -Wl,-soname,libmatio.so.13 -o libmatio.so.1.5.28 CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/endian.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/mat.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/io.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/inflate.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/mat73.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/matvar_cell.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/matvar_struct.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/mat4.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/mat5.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/src/read_data.c.o CMakeFiles/matio.dir/snprintf/snprintf.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial: -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/libhdf5.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
